chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No.1246 of 2023 ________________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S). ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA Nos. 1. 10917/2023 2. 11070/2023 23.08.2023 Mr. Ahmed Masood, Advocate for the Plaintiffs. Mr. Mehran Khan, Assistant A.G. Sindh, M/s. Aijaz ul Hassan Khan, Mukhtiarkar Scheme-33, Zubair Nazeer Ahmed Shaikh, SSP (East), DSP Sohail Faiz, SDPO Sohram Goth, Insp/DSP Jehan Khan Niazi on behalf of SSP Keamari, SHO/SI Sadaruddin, P.S. Sohrab Goth, are present. ------------ Reply / Comments filed on behalf of Contemnor No.2 (S.S.P. East), SHO P.S. Sohrab Goth and S.S.P., District Keamari, are taken on record. Nazir’s Report dated 16.08.2023 [presented on 18.08.2023] is taken on record subject to any objection. According to Report, when the earlier site inspection was done, the persons, who are now present at the suit land, were not there. Earlier, the possession was restored on the intervention of concerned Deputy Commissioner, but Police Officials were reluctant to restore the possession. Mr. Zubair Nazeer Ahmed Shaikh, S.S.P., East, present today, has attempted to dispute the above position at the site. Prima facie, it is very clear that Local Administration is involved in massive land grabbing in the City of Karachi, which cannot be done without the aid and assistance of concerned Revenue Officials, Police and those exercising political influence. All alleged Contemnors should show cause that why contempt proceeding should not be initiated against them and they should not be punished accordingly.

Prima facie, it is very clear that Local Administration is involved in massive land grabbing in the City of Karachi, which cannot be done without the aid and assistance of concerned Revenue Officials, Police and those exercising political influence. All alleged Contemnors should show cause that why contempt proceeding should not be initiated against them and they should not be punished accordingly. Mr. Aijaz ul Hassan Khan, Mukhtiarkar, Scheme-33, present today, is also prima facie involved, therefore, contempt proceeding will also be initiated against him. On the next date of hearing, they all should be present for further proceeding. Possession should be restored. Compliance Report be filed by learned Assistant A.G. Sindh. In view of the above, ad-interim order granted earlier vide order dated 03.08.2023, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions; consequently, application-C.M.A. No.10917 of 2023, stands disposed of. To come up on 11.09.2023 at 11.00 a.m., when all Officials should be present to face the contempt proceeding. Judge Riaz / P.S.
